baseline_detail.query: What do I need to do to create a FluxPark account?
నాకు FluxPark ఖాతా సృష్టించడానికి ఏమి అవసరం?
Which roles are available when I'm setting up my apartment?
Someone already added their building to FluxPark — can I just join them?
I'm part of two buildings on FluxPark, how do I move between them?
मैं FluxPark पर दो इमारतों का हिस्सा हूं, मैं उनके बीच कैसे जाऊं?
Where does my parking spot number come from when I register?
What's the difference between a slot marked rented and one marked occupied?
How can I rent out my empty parking space to someone else?
I urgently need my parking space back after lending it out, how?
How can I get a guest a place to park when they visit?
నా అతిథికి పార్కింగ్ స్థలం ఎలా ఇప్పించాలి?
Why does my visitor's request still say pending?
What does my guest need to show the gate staff?
Security let someone in I wasn't told about — where do I see that?
As staff at the office, how do I book parking for the next day?
Is it possible to back out of a parking booking for tomorrow?
क्या मैं कल की पार्किंग बुकिंग रद्द कर सकता हूं?
When I let someone use my spot, who pays whom?
Does the management committee take a cut from parking rentals?
How do I get rid of all my unread alerts at once?
How do I take someone off the resident list?
Can I download the visitor history as a spreadsheet?
What kinds of things can I ask the chatbot to do?
Does anyone besides me see my conversation with the assistant?
Which assistant option keeps everything on my own computer?
How do I switch the app to Telugu?
मैं ऐप को हिन्दी में कैसे बदलूं?
I'm on gate duty, how do I let a visitor in?
A guest showed up without any booking, what should the guard do?
